title: Executive Order 8387—Partial Revocation of Executive Order of December 5, 1913
text:
PUBLIC WATER RESTORATION NO. 85
WYOMING
By virtue of the authority vested in me by section 1 of the act of June 25, 1910, c. 421, 36 stat. 847, the Executive Order of December 5, 1913, creating Public Water Reserve No. 12, is hereby revoked in so far as it pertains to or affects the following-described land in Wyoming:
WYOMING
SIXTH PRINCIPAL MERIDIAN
T. 46 N., R. 71 W.,
sec. 18, SW¼SE¼;
sec. 19, S½NE¼, N½SE¼;
sec. 21, N½NW¼.
FRANKLIN D. ROOSEVELT
The White House,
April 4, 1940.
